case_title: DEBORAH QUINONES VS. CHRISTINA M ROBERTS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-24-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH QUINONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA M. ROBERTS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT FACILITATES A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY THE PRINCIPLE AMOUNT OF $6,061.56 AND COSTS $150.00 TOTAL AMOUNT $6211.56. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $250.00 A MONTH BY PERSONAL CHECK STARTING 10-15-20 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER FOR 25 MONTHS. FINAL PAYMENT WILL BE $211.56 ON THE 25TH MONTH. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING, A PROGRESS REPORT WILL BE SET EVERY 3 MONTHS. COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION UNTIL RESOLVED OR UNTIL CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COURT IS RECEIVED STATING THE MATTER HAS BEEN RESOLVED AND THAT PAYMENTS HAVE BEEN PAID IN FULL. IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE NOT MET PARTIES ARE TO RETURN COURT ON THE SET PROGRESS DATE AT WHICH TIME JUDGMENT WILL BE RENDERED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-13-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-03-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2961.56 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 12 PAYMENTS. ELEVEN $250 PAYMENTS SHALL BE MADE ON THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH STARTING ON MAY 31ST. THE 12TH PAYMENT SHALL BE FOR $211.56. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEBRUARY 2ND HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH QUINONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA M ROBERTS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS COURT SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BROKEN AND SHE HAS NOT RECEIVING PAYMENTS FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTINA M ROBERTS. PLAINTIFF STATED OUT OF THE 12 MONTHS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, DEFENDANT HAS ONLY PAID 5 MONTHS; TOTALING $1250 PAID BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. MATTER CONTINUED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR 3 MONTHS REOCCURRING UNTIL MAR-2023, WHICH IS 1 MONTH AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE. ORIGINAL RESOLVE DATE WAS OCT-2022 PLUS 4 MONTHS OF NON-PAYMENT MAKES THE NEW RESOLVE DATE AS FEB-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-19TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 3 MONTHS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN FOR 4 MONTHS WITHOUT PAYMENT: THE LAST PAYMENT WAS MADE IN DEC 2020. PARTIES RESUMED THE SAME CONDITIONS AS SET FORTH IN THE ORIGINAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, STATUS REPORTS TO THE COURT ARE NOT REQUIRED, BUT WILL BE ACCEPTED AS DECLARATIONS. A CHECK IS TENDERED IN COURT FOR $250 FOR THE MAY PAYMENT. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE AUG-13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE THIS CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR THREE MONTHS.
